name: 5dim_trains
title: 5Dim's mod - Trains
author: 5Dim
description:
Trains module for 5Dim's mod
Expands the railway system with faster and more capable trains
This mod includes:
- 10 tiers of locomotives (increased speed and power)
- 10 tiers of cargo wagons (increased capacity)
- 10 tiers of fluid wagons (increased capacity)
